default_style: CCTV, Ring Camera, Bodycam, or low quality smartphone footage

topics.description: Bodycam footage. A dog stealing a large piece of meat from Costco and zooming through the aisles while being chased by a cop.
Police pull over a speeding car. Bodycam shows the cop approaching the window, but there's a cat sitting in the driver's seat. The cat immediately slams the gas pedal and drives off.

Ring camera footage. A man is peacefully sleeping on a lawn chair on his porch. A black bear walks up and sniffs his face. The man wakes up in shock, which startles the big bear into running away hilariously.

Ring camera footage of a baby crawling near the front door as a crocodile approaches. Before the croc can strike, a brave house cat flies in out of nowhere, fiercely hissing and scaring the crocodile away. Mom rushes in seconds later.
Farm security camera. A massive eagle swoops down trying to grab a small cat. Suddenly, a brave goat charges from off-screen and headbutts the eagle, saving the cat.

Home indoor camera. A baby in a onesie curiously climbs up to a high open window. A family dog sneaks up from behind, gently grabs the baby's onesie, and pulls the baby backward to safety just as the mom rushes into the frame in a panic.

Smartphone footage. The living room is destroyed with trash everywhere. The cat is meowing angrily and pointing its paw directly at the guilty-looking golden retriever. The owner is listening to the cat like a detective.

Home camera or smartphone video of a man sitting peacefully on the toilet, reading. Suddenly, a wild deer (or large animal) smashes completely through the bathroom window, causing pure chaos as the man screams and falls over.

Low quality wobbly smartphone footage of a fancy dinner party. Everything is calm until a cat leaps from an indoor balcony, grabbing the massive chandelier. The cat swings on it, eventually dropping the entire chandelier onto the dinner table.

Steady smartphone footage of a bride and groom about to carefully cut a massive, beautiful multi-tier wedding cake. Just before the knife touches it, a big dog jumps onto the table, taking a massive bite out of the cake and knocking it over.
